meta_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve can't deploy apps (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome can't deploy apps. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve Deployment Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with deployment. Master Git with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship professional-grade SaaS applications at record speed.
content.answer_block: Deployment failures usually stem from environment drift or misconfigured CI/CD pipelines. By integrating AI-assisted Git workflows, you can automate infrastructure-as-code validation and catch deployment blockers before they hit production. Use Antigravity to structure your repository and Claude Code to execute terminal-level fixes, ensuring your production environment mirrors your development success.
content.intro:
The client is waiting, the deadline is breathing down your neck, and your deployment pipeline is throwing cryptic exit codes. You’ve spent hours debugging environment variables instead of building features. It’s the silent killer of freelance momentum: the 'cannot deploy' loop that turns high-margin projects into bottomless pits of unpaid labor.

But what if you could treat your deployment process like a feature, not a chore? By leveraging the synergy between Antigravity’s architectural intelligence and Claude Code’s terminal execution, you can transform your Git workflow into a self-healing deployment engine. It’s time to stop fighting the infrastructure and start shipping with the precision of a senior architect.

steps.title: Audit Repository Environment
steps.description: Before pushing to production, identify hidden configuration gaps by scanning your local environment against production requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this codebase and identify missing environment variables or configuration mismatches that would cause a deployment failure on Vercel/AWS.

steps.title: Automate Git Hooks for CI/CD
steps.description: Prevent broken builds by forcing linting and type-checking before every commit using AI-generated git hooks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust husky pre-commit hook that runs tsc and eslint, ensuring no code is committed unless it passes build checks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'npx husky add .husky/pre-commit "npm run build"'

steps.title: Configure Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC)
steps.description: Standardize your infrastructure so that deployment is repeatable and predictable across different client projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a minimal Terraform or Serverless framework configuration file that handles environment-specific secrets securely.

steps.title: AI-Driven Debugging of Failed Builds
steps.description: When a deployment fails, use Claude Code to parse the logs and apply the exact fix to your repository.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze these deployment logs and suggest the exact code change needed to resolve the dependency conflict.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'npm run build > build.log && cat build.log'

steps.title: Final Deployment Validation
steps.description: Perform a sanity check on your production URL to ensure the live environment matches the local expectation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a lightweight smoke test script to verify the core API endpoints are reachable after deployment.

pro_tips: Always maintain a .env.example file; use AI to sync it with your actual .env to prevent 'missing variable' errors.
Use Claude Code to write custom Git aliases for your deployment pipeline to shave minutes off every push cycle.
Implement a 'rollback-first' policy: create an AI script that snapshots your database before any major deployment.
Tag every production release with semantic versioning to make rollbacks trivial when infrastructure issues arise.
Treat your CI/CD configuration as a first-class citizen; keep it in the same repo and review it with AI during every sprint planning.
resources: Git Best Practices for SaaS: https://git-scm.com/book
content.next_steps: Now that your deployment pipeline is automated, focus on scaling your freelance business by productizing these deployment scripts into a reusable boilerplate for all future clients.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting deployment friction bleed your profit margins. Master these tools and start delivering production-ready code in half the time. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
